name: Flourless Walnut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks and 1 cup of sugar together until light and fluffy, about 4 minutes with an electric mixer.
2. Stir in lemon zest.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff.
4. Fold one quarter of the whites into the egg mixture to loosen it.
5. Stir walnuts into the mixture until thoroughly blended.
6. Fold in remaining egg whites carefully to maintain light texture.
7. Pour batter into a lightly buttered and floured 8-inch cake pan.
8. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 55-60 minutes or until firm and golden brown.
9. Cool cake on a rack before turning out.
10. Dust with powdered sugar and cocoa alternately.
11. Slice and serve with fresh berries.
Yield: One 8-inch cake (4 generous servings.)
